title: Berlin on Screen - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin appears on screen in three ways:** as itself, as history, and as a stand-in for other cities or fictional worlds.
**Essential Berlin films:** Run Lola Run, Good Bye, Lenin!, The Lives of Others, Victoria, The Bourne Supremacy, Bridge of Spies, Tár, John Wick: Chapter 4, and both Berlin-shot Hunger Games films.
**Major series connected to Berlin:** Babylon Berlin, Kleo, Dark, Homeland, Berlin Station, Sense8, Deutschland 83, The Queen's Gambit, Unorthodox, and Berlin ER.
**Best places to feel the screen mood:** Alexanderplatz, Karl-Marx-Allee, Museum Island, Oberbaumbrücke, Bahnhof Zoo, Wannsee, and Glienicke Bridge.
**The smartest way to explore:** treat Berlin as a layered city and pick a screen mood, not a checklist of exact camera spots.
